title: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
summary_full: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.
summary_public: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.
